text: Aurora Labs is hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer. Remote UTC +/- 4. React, TypeScript, Next.js, and data visualization for a signal dashboard used by product teams. Salary $145k - $175k. Apply via @aurora_hiring.

SignalBoard needs a Product UI Engineer for a remote Americas or Europe team. React, TypeScript, TanStack Query, saved views, accessibility, and polished analytics workflows. Salary $130k - $160k. Contact careers@signalboard.dev.

Northstar Cloud is looking for a Design Systems Lead. Remote-first. Own tokens, Storybook, React components, TypeScript quality, and cross-team frontend standards. Compensation not listed. Contact @northstar_people.
LatticeOps seeks a Frontend Platform Engineer. Remote, EU preferred. TypeScript, Vite, React, monorepos, build tooling, and internal platform work. EUR 85k - 110k. Contact @latticeops_jobs.
Meridian Data is hiring an Analytics Frontend Developer. Remote or Berlin hybrid. React, TypeScript, D3, Testing Library, and dashboards for data teams. EUR 75k - 95k. Contact jobs@meridiandata.io.
Orbit Commerce needs a Senior React Contractor for three months. Remote. React, TypeScript, GraphQL, storefront performance, and checkout UI cleanup. $85 - $105/hour. Apply via @orbit_contracts.
Atlas Cloud is hiring a Frontend Developer in Warsaw. Office-only role. React and CSS for internal admin pages. Salary not specified. Contact @atlascloud_hr.
Bright Retail seeks a Web UI Generalist. Hybrid in London. JavaScript, CSS, CMS templates, campaign pages, and landing page maintenance. GBP 55k. Contact careers@brightretail.example.
